title: pritzelago alpina subsp. brevicaulis
intro: Pritzelago alpina subsp. brevicaulis, also known as Alpine Wintercress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alpine Wintercress include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Alpine Wintercress is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a fresh or dried herb in herbal preparations.
